caption:
We just raised 1.5 Crore Rs in pre-seed funding from Aviral Bhatnagar’s AJVC fund. 

We realised that personal finance is broken in India. Despite, so many apps, Indians are defaulting on EMIs and their credit card dues are mounting. 

And the reason is that the existing personal finance apps, give you so much data, but they don’t guide you in making decisions. 

Our co-founder Prithvi, had experienced this first hand when he was in Europe, how finance apps there, give people personalised guidance on how to manage their finances, how to plan an important purchase etc. 

And this clarity, we are trying to bring in India, with Finanjo. 

Link to download Finanjo is in our page bio.
